name: energetic
description: Workshop energy with hands-on demos, fast-paced collaborative learning, and the buzz of a room full of motivated people building something together. This mood captures the electric feeling of active, engaged education.

style.lighting: bright workshop lighting | dynamic mixed natural and artificial | energetic fill light
style.color_grade: crisp teal highlights | high energy contrast | clean with vivid accents
style.camera: dynamic handheld workshop | fast cuts between activities | group energy wide shots
style.composition: collaborative group framing | hands-on activity close-ups | whiteboard brainstorming
style.props: whiteboards with diagrams, laptops, sticky note walls, group workstations, timer display

copy_tone: Action-driven and motivating. Uses time-based urgency and collaborative language. 'Let's build this together,' 'hands on in 3, 2, 1.' Creates momentum and excitement about learning by doing.

music.mood: driving electronic, upbeat motivational, workshop energy

example_prompt_fragment: A dynamic workshop scene with participants gathered around a whiteboard covered in colorful diagrams and sticky notes, laptops open on collaborative workstations, bright energetic lighting, one person gesturing enthusiastically while explaining, teal and green accent colors, fast-paced documentary style, hands-on collaborative education photography
